docs.title: Home

docs.text: Perth, WA Software Engineer Data Analyst Sausage Dog Owner
docs.title: SupImDos

docs.text: Summary Hello! I'm a software engineer from Perth, Western Australia. My tertiary education includes a Bachelor of Actuarial & Applied Statistics and a Graduate Certificate of Cyber Security. This means my formal background primarily consists of mathematics, statistics and data analysis, with a small amount of programming and IT. I've had a passion for programming and software development since I was young, and through my technical roles, personal projects and active interest in the open-source community I've become a software engineer. I love Python. I spend a lot of my free time working on my personal projects as well as contributing to open-source projects online. In my spare time I'm also learning Rust and Ruby. Pets Frank (Miniature Dachshund) Marley (Golden Retriever) These are my dogs; Frank and Marley . I use them for my logos, mascots and avatars online. FAQ Why is your username SupImDos ? My childhood nickname was " Haydos ", which was often shortened to just " Dos ". The username itself is a shortened and stylised form of the greeting " Sup, I'm Dos ", which I copied from one of my friends who was a very high level on Runescape. I eventually used the username long enough that I got stuck with it. Where is your [ GitHub | LinkedIn | Email | Resume ]? All my links are in the website footer, see the bottom right of the page.
